title: Landing page + Agent Auth API dashboard
acceptance_criteria: New page at /agent-auth with tier comparison table (Hobby $0/Pro $29/Scale $99)
Each tier card has CTA linking to Stripe Checkout
Agent management UI: list agents, create agent (name input), delete agent
Token display: shown once at creation with copy button + warning 'store this securely'
Usage dashboard: requests used / limit, agent count / limit
Audit log viewer (Pro+) with filter by agent/event
